title: 雨の日に出会った不思議な少女
concept: 雨の日に不思議な少女と出会い、自己発見の旅を通じて内面的な成長を遂げる物語。

timeline.label: Intro: Reflective Rain
timeline.text_primary: 雨の音が静かに街を包む
timeline.text_secondary: 灰色の空、反射する水たまり

timeline.label: Development: Mysterious Encounter
timeline.text_primary: 傘の無い不思議な少女がそこに立っていた
timeline.text_secondary: 彼女の周りだけ雨が降らない

timeline.label: Development: Inner Conflict
timeline.text_primary: 彼女の存在に引き込まれるが、心に不安が渦巻く
timeline.text_secondary: 自分を疑い、揺れ動く感情

timeline.label: Climax: Dreamlike Connection
timeline.text_primary: 彼女と目が合った瞬間、世界が広がる
timeline.text_secondary: 心の奥に響く声が聞こえる

timeline.label: Conclusion: Epilogue of Enlightenment
timeline.text_primary: 少女は微笑み、ゆっくりと消えた
timeline.text_secondary: 新たな視点で雨の街を歩き出す

asset_prompts.music: Compose an evocative and ethereal piece consisting of gentle piano melodies and ambient rain sounds, subtly changing in tone to reflect inner turmoil and resolution.
asset_prompts.sfx: Sound effects of gentle rain, soft footsteps, and a faint whispering voice on the wind.
asset_prompts.video: An urban scene soaked in rain, highlighting reflections on puddles. The mysterious girl stands, radiating an ethereal glow, and the environment around her shows subtle visual shifts from mundane to ethereal, representing the protagonist's perspective changes.
asset_prompts.voice: 彼女の瞳に映る世界の広がり。その変化を心に深く刻み、新しい日常が始まる。
